title: Emily Short’s Interactive Storytelling
creator: Emily Short
description: A large archive of analysis, reviews, design notes, tools, and talks about interactive fiction, choice design, conversation systems, procedural narrative, and the history of the form.
useful: The archive links practical design problems to a wide range of playable work and earlier research.
audience: Writers, narrative designers, and researchers who want examples beyond mainstream cinematic games.
learning: Find precedents for specific interactive-story problems
Compare different structures for choice and conversation
Build a broader vocabulary of interactive fiction
